root_text.an4.176:1.1: “Saddho, bhikkhave, bhikkhu evaṁ sammā āyācamāno āyāceyya:
root_text.an4.176:1.3: Esā, bhikkhave, tulā etaṁ pamāṇaṁ mama sāvakānaṁ bhikkhūnaṁ, yadidaṁ sāriputtamoggallānā.
root_text.an4.176:2.1: Saddhā, bhikkhave, bhikkhunī evaṁ sammā āyācamānā āyāceyya:
root_text.an4.176:2.2: ‘tādisā homi yādisā khemā ca bhikkhunī uppalavaṇṇā cā’ti.
root_text.an4.176:2.3: Esā, bhikkhave, tulā etaṁ pamāṇaṁ mama sāvikānaṁ bhikkhunīnaṁ, yadidaṁ khemā ca bhikkhunī uppalavaṇṇā ca.
root_text.an4.176:3.1: Saddho, bhikkhave, upāsako evaṁ sammā āyācamāno āyāceyya:
root_text.an4.176:3.2: ‘tādiso homi yādiso citto ca gahapati hatthako ca āḷavako’ti.
root_text.an4.176:3.3: Esā, bhikkhave, tulā etaṁ pamāṇaṁ mama sāvakānaṁ upāsakānaṁ, yadidaṁ citto ca gahapati hatthako ca āḷavako.
root_text.an4.176:4.1: Saddhā, bhikkhave, upāsikā evaṁ sammā āyācamānā āyāceyya:
root_text.an4.176:4.2: ‘tādisā homi yādisā khujjuttarā ca upāsikā veḷukaṇḍakiyā ca nandamātā’ti.
root_text.an4.176:4.3: Esā, bhikkhave, tulā etaṁ pamāṇaṁ mama sāvikānaṁ upāsikānaṁ, yadidaṁ khujjuttarā ca upāsikā veḷukaṇḍakiyā ca nandamātā”ti.

translation_text.an4.176:1.1: “Mendicants, a faithful monk would rightly aspire:
translation_text.an4.176:1.2: ‘May I be like Sāriputta and Moggallāna!’
translation_text.an4.176:1.3: These are a standard and a measure for my monk disciples, that is, Sāriputta and Moggallāna.
translation_text.an4.176:2.1: A faithful nun would rightly aspire:
translation_text.an4.176:2.2: ‘May I be like the nuns Khemā and Uppalavaṇṇā!’
translation_text.an4.176:2.3: These are a standard and a measure for my nun disciples, that is, the nuns Khemā and Uppalavaṇṇā.
translation_text.an4.176:3.1: A faithful layman would rightly aspire:
translation_text.an4.176:3.2: ‘May I be like the householder Citta and Hatthaka of Āḷavī!’
translation_text.an4.176:3.3: These are a standard and a measure for my male lay disciples, that is, the householder Citta and Hatthaka of Āḷavī.
translation_text.an4.176:4.1: A faithful laywoman would rightly aspire:
translation_text.an4.176:4.2: ‘May I be like the laywomen Khujjuttarā and Veḷukaṇṭakī, Nanda’s mother!’
translation_text.an4.176:4.3: These are a standard and a measure for my female lay disciples, that is, the laywomen Khujjuttarā and Veḷukaṇṭakī, Nanda’s mother.”
